title: National Clinical Excellence Awards scheme reforms: submit your view
body: "During the summer of 2020 we discussed 5 subjects with key stakeholders and our scoring sub-committee members through a series of video conferences:   improving the application process rankings and citations domains and scoring equality and diversity sub-committee structure   We now want to ensure that all interested parties have the opportunity to feed back and not just those on our copy lists who were available to attend.   If you have a contribution to make, please email accea@dhsc.gov.uk no later than Monday 30 November 2020.   Please title your message ‘Focus group written submission’ and make it clear whether it’s a personal view or is sent on behalf of your organisation. "
